# availableFunctionalUnitTypes

**Instance Property**

An array of functional unit types available on this scanner.

## Declaration

```swift
var availableFunctionalUnitTypes: [NSNumber] { get }
```

## Discussion

This array contains [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSNumber] objects whose values are of type [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICScannerFunctionalUnitType].

## Selecting a Functional Unit

- **selectedFunctionalUnit**: The currently selected functional unit on the scanner.
- **requestSelect(_:)**: Requests to select a functional unit on the scanner.
- **ICScannerFunctionalUnitType**: The types of scanner functional units.
- **ICScannerFunctionalUnitState**: Flags to indicate the state of the scanner functional unit.
